title: Iron Ender Chests
description: This mod adds upgrades to the Ender Chests. Chests with more storage space with similar functionality.
body:
![IRON ENDER CHESTS BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CRn27PTC/images/53fbc1c4fbd1040539c0d1aceb233dab437f25ad.png)

### This mod adds upgrades to the Ender Chests, including:

### - Iron (+1 row)
### - Copper (+1 row)
### - Gold (+1 row)
### - Lapis Lazuli (+1 row)
### - Redstone (+1 row)
### - Diamond (+2 rows)
### - Emerald (+2 rows)
### - Netherite (+3 rows)

![IRON ENDER CHESTS SCREENSHOT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CRn27PTC/images/a42ea3093cb3300dcf8ea704f96464a1ba25092e.png)
